title: DAuthentication
description: DAuth is a lightweight and secure authentication solution designed servers running on the Forge. (originally created for Y-craft server)
body:
**Dauth** is a lightweight security mod for Minecraft servers. It adds a simple login screen that appears when you join.

* **Protect Your Account:** Use GUI to create an account so no one else can play as you.
* **Streamer Friendly:** When you log in, your password is hidden (`******`) so it’s safe to stream or record.
* **3 Attempts Kick:** If someone guesses your password wrong 3 times, they get kicked from the server.

**Commands for Admins:**

`/dauth reset <player>` - Resets a player's password.

`/dauth set <player> <password>` - Forcefully sets a new password for a player.
